sections.paragraph:
λογίζομαι [λογεύω ‘collect’] interest in numerical calculation finds specific or implied expression in almost all uses of λ., with the result that the general glosses reckon or calculate can function for translation of λ. in its central computational sense as well as transf. senses

—a. w. focus on process of calculating reckon, calculate J 11:50; 1 Cor 13:5 (keep score [of]); 2 Cor 5:19; credit Ro 4:3 and oft. in the ch.; 2 Cor 12:6; Js 2:23.

—b. w. focus on the product of calculation reckon, count, class Mk 15:27 [28] v.l.; Lk 22:37; Ac 19:27; Ro 2:26; 9:8; 2 Cor 11:5; 2 Ti 4:16. Then with more fluid computational imagery, focusing on cerebral activity

—c. reckon, think (about) Ro 2:3; 6:11; 8:18; 1 Cor 4:1; 13:11; 2 Cor 10:2; Phil 4:8; Hb 11:19; 1 Pt 5:12.
